title: TranslateMC
description: Translate your MC Server easily and free
body:
# TranslateMC Plugin - Server Translation Made Simple

Translate your Minecraft server easily without any coding knowledge. TranslateMC is the first free translation system specifically designed for Minecraft server owners.

Players select their preferred language in-game using the language selector GUI. Use PlaceholderAPI to display translated messages throughout your server.

Developers can also integrate TranslateMC directly into their plugins using our Maven dependency.

## Get Started:
- Web interface Setup: https://steyondev.github.io/wiki/TranslateMC/Webinterface/Setup/
- Minecraft Plugin Installation: https://steyondev.github.io/wiki/TranslateMC/Plugin/Setup/
- Developer Integration: https://steyondev.github.io/wiki/TranslateMC/Dev/Setup/
- Full Documentation: https://steyondev.github.io/wiki/TranslateMC/GetStarted/

## Features:
- In-game language selector GUI for players
- Support for unlimited languages
- PlaceholderAPI integration
- REST API for backend integration
- Web-based translation dashboard
- Maven dependency for developers

Perfect for international Minecraft servers with diverse player communities.
